modules.title: Treaty Terminal
modules.tagline: Treaty rights, consultation status, governance risk, and evidence strength
modules.lede: The Treaty Terminal tracks legal and governance signals across major Canadian projects: where treaty rights and Aboriginal title interact with project decisions, where consultation has and has not been adequate, and where consent doctrine remains unsettled.

modules.title: Water Intelligence
modules.tagline: Watershed stress, drought signals, industrial demand, and First Nation water rights
modules.lede: Water Intelligence tracks where projects are being approved against weakening water-availability assumptions and against First Nation water rights that are recognized but unevenly implemented through provincial allocation systems.

modules.title: Energy & Grid Intelligence
modules.tagline: Transmission constraints, demand growth, AI/data-centre load, and asset-stranding exposure
modules.lede: Energy & Grid Intelligence tracks the realism of grid-expansion assumptions in major-project planning: where transmission cannot keep up with electrification, where AI / data-centre load is rewriting forecasts, and where long-life oil & gas assets carry demand-trajectory exposure.

modules.title: Indigenous Finance
modules.tagline: Ownership structures, loan guarantees, debt exposure, and cash-flow waterfalls
modules.lede: Indigenous Finance tracks how Indigenous communities are participating in major-project ownership: through which financing structures (CIB, AIOC, FNFA-style), under what loan-guarantee terms, with what debt exposure, and with what residual risk in stress scenarios.
